name: MHA | Villain Rehab (UA 1-A)
description:
This bot has most of the relevant information from the My Hero Academia Wiki (through Lorebooks). It also accounts for the logistic of having a 21st student in 1-A.


This bot is an alternative scenario for my MHA bot — I recommend you read it's bio to understand better how the bot works, especially for the part of Statistics and Attributes. Since all the information is contained in lorebooks, this bot will also be kept up to date, and it includes all of the features of my main MHA bot.

I made a simple system for the academy to follow for the rehabilitation, and I left some blind spots on purpose in case you want to be evil, escape, or something like that.

I also left the specifics of what you did to be here for you to decide. The only thing I have specified is that you were a vilain and you were captured, everything else is up to you. It's not necessary, but I recommend you define that in the bot's memory.


Proxy:

As always, I recommend you use proxy, and I also recommend you use Sophia's proxy URL. For more information on that check my Proxy Guide.

Disclaimer: Upon testing I have noticed that this bot will average ~20k tokens per message. So expect incoherence if you use JLLM or any models with context lower than 32k.
creator: nalabyst
